steps.text:
Palmer's Bar.
The stage is barely six inches off the floor.
The room smells like impending bad decisions.

steps.speaker: Lucky
steps.text: No Brian to ruin the mix. Just us.

steps.speaker: Phoenix
steps.text: My brain thinks that guy in the back is a cop.

steps.speaker: Ryan
steps.text: [No obnoxious guitar solos. Just pure unadulterated rhythm. The slime is pulsating in 7/8 time. I can work with this.]
